title: Investigate intermittent Node 25 import truncation during parallel CLI runs
description: Parallel standalone CLI invocations intermittently fail with SyntaxError: Unexpected end of input while importing execution-lineage.js or metrics-snapshot.js under Node v25.5.0, even when node --check passes and sequential runs succeed. Capture reproduction conditions, isolate whether this is a Node/runtime loader issue or an AOF module pattern issue, and define the mitigation path before broader parallel operator usage.
triage_notes: Mitigated the intermittent parallel standalone CLI instability by removing eager command imports from src/cli.js, lazy-loading only the requested command module, and explicitly warning that Node 25 is outside the CI-validated Node 22 lane. Reproduced prior failure conditions qualitatively, then re-ran the same external parallel verification commands successfully after the change. npm test -- --runInBand passed 138/0.
